text_zh: 刚才那个太有对抗性了。
reply_original: I am truly sorry the character's tone was too confrontational. Our AI is currently adapting to a new system, and sometimes its personality can get a bit carried away. Please try the [Reset] button to start fresh, or email details/screenshots to support@fantachat.ai so our devs can tune the behavior. We want your experience to be pleasant!
reply_zh: 对于该角色的语气过于咄咄逼人，我深表歉意。我们的AI目前正在适配新系统，有时性格表现会有些过火。请尝试点击[重置]按钮重新开始，或将详细信息/截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们的开发人员调整其行为。我们希望为您提供愉快的体验！
